name: rc_common_msgs
description: Common msg and srv definitions used by Roboception's ROS2 packages

CameraParam.description: Camera parameters that relate to a published image
CameraParam.raw:
# Camera parameters that relate to a published image

# Header with timestamp and frame_id to which the parameters belong
std_msgs/Header header

# True in case of a color camera
bool is_color_camera

# Exposure time of the camera in seconds
float32 exposure_time

# Gain factor in dB
float32 gain

# Line status for DigitalIO control according to GenICam SFNC:
# Current status of all available line signals in a single bitfield
uint32 line_status_all

# Line sources for DigitalIO control according to GenICam SFNC:
# Specifies for each line which internal acquisition or I/O source
# signal is output on the respective line.
#
# The keys define the lines, the values define the sources; e.g.
# [ {key: "out1", value: "ExposureActive"},
#   {key: "out2", value: "Low"},
#   ...
# ]
#
KeyValue[] line_source

# Additional optional camera parameters as key value pairs
KeyValue[] extra_data

ReturnCode.description: This message shall be used in the response of services as a field called return_code.
ReturnCode.raw:
# This message shall be used in the response of services as a field called return_code.
# Confer to ReturnCodeConsts message for commonly used return code definitions.

# return codes
# >=0 - success
# < 0 - failure

# return code
int16 value

# return message
string message

ReturnCodeConstants.description: This message file defines commonly used constants
ReturnCodeConstants.raw:
# This message file defines commonly used constants
# for services' return codes

#  Default success without additional information
int16 SUCCESS=0

# Reserved error codes (reserved range [-99,-1])
int16 INVALID_ARGUMENT=-1   # An invalid argument was passed with the service request
int16 INTERNAL_ERROR=-2     # Internal error
int16 INTERNAL_TIMEOUT=-3   # Timeout in internal computation
int16 SENSOR_TIMEOUT=-4     # Timeout while waiting for image data to fulfill a request
int16 IO_ERROR=-7           # IO error
int16 NOT_APPLICABLE=-8     # Request not applicable (e.g. in current state)
int16 INVALID_LICENSE=-9    # No valid license to fulfill this request
int16 CAPACITY_EXCEEDED=-10 # capacity exceeded, i.e. new element could not be added

# Reserved non-error codes (reserved range [1,99])
int16 TIMEOUT_REACHED=3     # timeout in internal computation is reached, but a partial result could still be provided
int16 CAPACITY_REACHED=10   # max capacity is reached, i.e. list is now full
int16 OVERWRITTEN=11        # existing data/element overwritten
int16 HINTS=999             # performance/implementation hints for application developers

# each module defines own msg-file with consts for the module specific return codes

fields.name: INVALID_ARGUMENT
fields.comment: An invalid argument was passed with the service request

fields.name: SENSOR_TIMEOUT
fields.comment: Timeout while waiting for image data to fulfill a request

fields.name: NOT_APPLICABLE
fields.comment: Request not applicable (e.g. in current state)

fields.name: INVALID_LICENSE
fields.comment: No valid license to fulfill this request

fields.name: CAPACITY_EXCEEDED
fields.comment: capacity exceeded, i.e. new element could not be added

fields.name: TIMEOUT_REACHED
fields.comment: timeout in internal computation is reached, but a partial result could still be provided

fields.name: CAPACITY_REACHED
fields.comment: max capacity is reached, i.e. list is now full

Trigger.description: This is the roboception equivalent to the std_msgs/Trigger service.
Trigger.raw:
# This is the roboception equivalent to the std_msgs/Trigger service.
# It only differs in the response, which is the roboception standard
# return code
---
rc_common_msgs/ReturnCode return_code
